products_covered: Amazon products, services, stores, website and physical locations, devices and applications that reference this Privacy Notice (together "Amazon Services")

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention biometric data collection at all, so no limits or justifications for its collection are provided.
The policy does not mention health data at all, so it cannot describe any limits or justifications for collecting it.
The policy does not mention physiological data at all, so it cannot be evaluated for data minimization adequacy.

collected.policy_snippet: Our physical stores may use cameras, computer vision, sensors, and other technology to gather information about your activity in the store, such as the products and services you interact with.
collected.purpose: To gather information about customer activity in physical stores.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' and lists broad categories of collection, but does not provide concrete limits or justifications for each type of physical data collected.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To provide and improve Amazon Services.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months)

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below and with subsidiaries Amazon.com, Inc. controls
shared.purpose: To perform business functions and transactions.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data such as images and videos from stores are collected and stored, with sharing to subsidiaries and third parties. While deletion options exist for some data (like Alexa recordings), the policy lacks specific retention limits for all physical data categories.

collected.policy_snippet: Automatic Information: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide, troubleshoot, and improve Amazon Services; for recommendations and personalization; for advertising; and to prevent fraud.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' and provides broad examples of collection, but does not describe concrete limits on what behavioral data is collected or provide a clear justification for why each type is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: Automatic Information: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To provide functionality, analyze performance, fix errors, improve usability, personalize experience, and for advertising.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months), or you can choose to not save any voice recordings.

shared.policy_snippet: We provide ad companies with information that allows them to serve you with more useful and relevant Amazon ads and to measure their effectiveness.
shared.purpose: To serve and measure the effectiveness of interest-based advertising.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is collected broadly and stored for purposes including advertising and personalization, with sharing to third-party advertisers. Deletion policies are user-managed and specific to Alexa interactions, not general behavioral data.
